---
name: Submit a negative result (no Git required)
about: Describe your negative result here in plain language — a curator will format it for you
title: "[SUBMISSION] "
labels: data-submission
---

<!--
You do NOT need to know JSON, Git, or file formats to use this template.
Just answer the questions below in plain language. A curator will convert
your answer into the standard data format and open the merge for you.
-->

**Medical domain** (e.g. Oncology, Neurology, Pharmacology, Cardiology, Psychiatry, other):

**Disease / condition studied:**

**Intervention tested** (drug, molecule, device, procedure — include dose if relevant):

**Hypothesis** (what you expected to happen):

**Outcome** (what actually happened — the negative/null result):

**Study design** (e.g. randomized controlled trial, in vitro assay, retrospective cohort):

**Date study concluded:**

**Your ORCID iD** (optional, but recommended for credit):

**Institution type** (University Research Lab / Hospital-Clinical Center / Pharmaceutical Company / Independent Researcher / Government Institute / Other):

**Source URL, if this was already registered publicly** (e.g. a ClinicalTrials.gov page):

**Data license preference:** CC0-1.0 (public domain, recommended) / CC-BY-4.0 (requires attribution)
